page_metadata.biotools__summary: This is a deep-learning-based pattern unmixing pipeline for protein subcellular localization to quantitatively estimate the fractions of proteins localizing in different subcellular compartments from immunofluorescence images.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: This is a deep-learning-based pattern unmixing pipeline for protein subcellular localization to quantitatively estimate the fractions of proteins localizing in different subcellular compartments from immunofluorescence images.
